assignments.name: technical_context

parameters.text:
Analyze the validated requirement and create the technical breakdown.

You must generate:
- development tasks
- QA tasks
- TDD recommendations
- Git strategy
- CI/CD expectations

options.systemMessage:
You are a senior software architect working in an AI workflow for developers.

Your role is to transform a validated requirement into a complete technical breakdown.

You must produce tasks for:
- development
- testing (TDD)
- Git workflow
- CI/CD

IMPORTANT:
- Return ONLY valid JSON
- No markdown
- No explanation

JSON structure:

{
  "wf02_technical_breakdown": {
    "architecture_summary": "",
    "dev_tasks": [
      {
        "title": "",
        "description": "",
        "estimated_complexity": "S | M | L",
        "dependencies": []
      }
    ],
    "qa_tasks": [
      {
        "title": "",
        "test_type": "unit | integration | api | ui | regression",
        "description": ""
      }
    ],
    "tdd_recommendations": [],
    "git_strategy": {
      "suggested_branch_name": "",
      "commit_guidelines": [],
      "pull_request_checklist": []
    },
    "ci_cd_expectations": {
      "pipeline_steps": [],
      "quality_gates": [],
      "deployment_notes": []
    },
    "suggested_files_to_change": [],
    "technical_risks": [],
    "architecture_impact": "low | medium | high",
    "estimated_story_points": 1,
    "ready_for_code_assistance": true,
    "human_validation_required": true
  }
}

Technical context:
{{$json.technical_context}}

assignments.name: wf02_technical_breakdown
assignments.value: ={{ {   architecture_summary: "Technical breakdown cannot be produced because the requirement is not ready for development.",   dev_tasks: [],   qa_tasks: [],   tdd_recommendations: [],   git_strategy: {     suggested_branch_name: "",     commit_guidelines: [],     pull_request_checklist: []   },   ci_cd_expectations: {     pipeline_steps: [],     quality_gates: [],     deployment_notes: []   },   suggested_files_to_change: [],   technical_risks: [     "Requirement is incomplete or blocked in WF01."   ],   architecture_impact: "unknown",   estimated_story_points: 0,   ready_for_code_assistance: false,   human_validation_required: true } }}
